caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black over-ear headphones, and a green t-shirt sits in a studio setting. His shirt features the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" with additional illegible text below. He is positioned in front of a black professional microphone. In the background, the walls are decorated with several framed photographs, and a white mannequin torso wearing a white shirt stands nearby. Clothing racks and other studio equipment are visible in the distance. Red and white logos appear in the lower corners of the scene, including one that reads "SIT TIGHT". Across the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing; he begins by looking forward, then lifts his right hand to gesture as he talks, and continues speaking while shifting his gaze slightly. The camera remains static, capturing his facial expressions and movements from the chest up.
